info.name: Currency Balboa
info.description: Panamanian Balboa (PAB) exchange rates relative to USD (base currency). Note: PAB is pegged 1:1 with USD.

buyRate.description: Buy rate for PAB (always 1.0 as it is pegged to USD)

sellRate.description: Sell rate for PAB (always 1.0 as it is pegged to USD)
